name: STOCK MANAGER
text: Inventory management system for retail stores: products, brands, stock and sales history. Node.js + MongoDB.
largeText: Full-stack project built with Node.js and MongoDB: product catalog with brands and types, stock control and sales history per store.

name: VOTING SYSTEM
text: Online voting system for electing the authorities of an academic committee. Flask + PostgreSQL.
largeText: Built with Flask and PostgreSQL: voter registration, secure ballot casting and result tallying for the committee election.
